name: Date Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, walnuts, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl.
2. Stir in the chopped dates until evenly distributed.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the egg, 2/3 cup of water, mayonnaise, and vanilla until smooth.
4. Pour the wet mixture into the dry ingredients and stir just until moistened.
5. Grease a 1-quart casserole or soufflé dish that fits loosely in a 6-quart pressure cooker.
6. Place aluminum foil securely over the casserole.
7. Put the cooking rack and 3 cups of hot water into the pressure cooker.
8. Place the greased casserole on the rack inside the pressure cooker.
9. Secure the cover tightly.
10. Cook for 40 minutes at a pressure setting of 15 pounds.
11. Allow the pressure to drop naturally before opening the lid.
12. Remove the bread from the casserole and let it cool in the dish on a wire rack.
13. Transfer the bread to a cutting board, remove from the dish, and refrigerate until chilled.
14. Slice and serve with cream cheese. Makes 1 loaf.
